title: phyllanthus consanguineus
intro: Phyllanthus consanguineus, also known as Niyog-niyogan, is a tropical vine plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties, which help to protect the liver and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Phyllanthus consanguineus include its ability to improve liver function, reduce blood pressure, and enhance immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Phyllanthus consanguineus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
